title: SWAT Team Soft Dart Blaster Set, 2 Toy Guns with 8 Foam Darts, Blue and Green, Age 3+
features: COMPLETE SET: Package includes 2 colourful dart blasters (blue and green) and 8 soft foam darts for exciting target practice and friendly competition
SAFE DESIGN: Constructed with soft foam darts and child-safe materials, suitable for children aged 3 years and above
EASY LOADING: Simple loading mechanism allows quick reloading of the foam darts for continuous play action
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Specially designed handles with textured surface provide comfortable grip for small hands during play
DUAL PLAY: Two blasters included for interactive play, perfect for developing hand-eye coordination and social skills through friendly competition
description: Product Description Get ready for action-packed playtime with this exciting SWAT Team Soft Dart Blaster Set! The package includes two vibrant toy blasters in eye-catching blue and green colours, along with 8 mega foam darts for extended play. Each blaster features an ergonomic design with textured grips for comfortable handling and precise aiming. The set comes with safety-minded soft foam darts that provide hours of imaginative play while being suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Perfect for children aged 3 and above, these lightweight blasters sport a sleek, modern design with distinctive Game 02 markings and striking orange accents. The easy-loading mechanism makes reloading quick and simple, keeping the fun flowing. Whether it's target practice or imaginative missions, this dual blaster set offers double the excitement. The compact size makes these blasters ideal for active play while being easy to carry and store. Inspire creative play scenarios and develop hand-eye coordination with this dynamic toy set that's sure to provide hours of entertainment. Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for Children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Balls & Small Parts
